CustomField.description: If ADM Approval Required returns False, this field displays 'N/A'. Otherwise, it shows the value from the ADM Approval Date field.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK( pro_ADM_Approval_Date__c )), TEXT(DAY(pro_ADM_Approval_Date__c )) & " " & CASE(MONTH(pro_ADM_Approval_Date__c ), 1, "Jan", 2, "Feb", 3, "Mar", 4, "Apr", 5, "May", 6, "Jun", 7, "Jul", 8, "Aug", 9, "Sep", 10, "Oct", 11, "Nov", 12, "Dec", "" ) & " " & TEXT(YEAR(pro_ADM_Approval_Date__c )), IF( pro_ADM_Approval_Required__c = False, "NA", "" ) )
CustomField.label: ADM Approval Date Formula
